scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client"
scripts.dev:server: npm run build:shared && npm run dev -w server
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.start: npm run build:shared && npm run start -w server
scripts.validate:crud: npm run build:shared && node --import tsx --test test/crud.test.ts
